ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the device */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* Configuration settings for the device */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the device (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "last_seen" TEXT /* Last time the device was seen or connected */,
  "mac_address" TEXT /* MAC address of the device */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Version of the firmware installed on the device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, locked, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the group was last updated */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who manages the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_groups_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_group_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user joined the group */,
  "left_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user left the group (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_group_memberships_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES user_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_group_memberships_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that triggered the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., authentication, connection, disconnection) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the event (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "handled_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who handled the event */,
  "handled_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the event was handled */,
  "alerted" INTEGER /* Indicates whether an alert was sent for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authentications" (
  "auth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each authentication attempt */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device used for authentication */,
  "auth_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the authentication attempt */,
  "auth_type" TEXT /* Type of authentication (e.g., face, fingerprint) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the authentication attempt (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "auth_method" TEXT /* Method of authentication (e.g., face, fingerprint, PIN) */,
  "confidence_score" TEXT /* Confidence score of the authentication attempt */,
  "logged_in" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the authentication attempt resulted in a login */,
  "logged_out" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user was logged out after the authentication attempt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("auth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_authentications_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_authentications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was assigned to the user */,
  "revoked_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was revoked (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the event */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the event was triggered */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device that triggered the event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., login, logout, update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
